channel.title: Gastronauts
channel.description: Latest releases from Gastronauts on Dropout.tv

item.title: Incog-Eato
item.description:
Chefs Sid Blackwell, Marcus Ponder, and David Bartnes make an allergy unfriendly meal for Keith, Zach, and Jonny.

Duration: 48:12

Tags: Gastronauts, jordan myrick, food, cooking, competitions, eating, chaos, keith habersberger, zach kornfeld, jonny manganello, jonny cakes, try guys, sidney blackwell, marcus ponder, david bartnes
